translations.en: a pretty young nurse with violet eyes.
translations.zh: 眼若紫蘿蘭的美麗年輕護士。

translations.en: "Leave these men alone! Can't you see they need to @rest?"
translations.zh: 「別去打擾這些人！難道看不出他們需要@rest（休息）嗎？」

translations.en: "My name is Sasha."
translations.zh: 「我叫莎夏。」

translations.en: "I @tend the sick. I know how to @heal, @cure, and @resurrect."
translations.zh: 「我@tend（照料）病人。我懂得@heal（療傷）、@cure（解毒）和@resurrect（起死）回生。」

translations.en: "Aye, these men's wounds need @time to @heal."
translations.zh: 「是的，這些人的傷口需要@time時間來@heal（癒合）。」

translations.en: "Thou hast kept me from my duties long enough. Away with thee!"
translations.zh: 「汝耽誤吾職責已久。去吧！」

translations.en: "More wounded? I'll do what I can."
translations.zh: 「又有傷者？我盡力而為。」

translations.en: The poor nurse seems weary beyond words.
translations.zh: 這位可憐的護士看上去疲憊不堪。

translations.en: "Poison? Yes, I can cure that. Let me see..."
translations.zh: 「中毒？是的，我能治。讓我看看……」

translations.en: Your question seems almost like a blow to the woman.
translations.zh: 你的問題彷彿給了她當頭一擊。

translations.en: "Nay, I cannot. I no longer have the energy, or the @reagents."
translations.zh: 「不，我做不到。吾已精疲力竭，@reagents（施法）材料也用盡了。」

translations.en: "It has been a dark, dark day indeed."
translations.zh: 「今日確實是黑暗的一天。」

translations.en: "I am sorry that I cannot help you, but we all @grieve today."
translations.zh: 「很抱歉幫不上忙，但今日吾等皆在@grieve（悲慟）之中。」

translations.en: "I have aided many today."
translations.zh: 「今日吾已救治了許多人。」

translations.en: "These men are the last; they are beyond the help of all save @time itself."
translations.zh: 「這些人是最後一批；除了@time時間本身，誰也幫不了他們了。」

translations.en: "These soldiers are the only survivors of an attempt to free the Shrine of @Compassion."
translations.zh: 「這些士兵是試圖解放@Compassion（慈悲）聖壇行動中唯一的倖存者。」

translations.en: "Show thy compassion now and let them @sleep."
translations.zh: 「請以慈悲之心讓他們@sleep（安眠）吧。」

translations.en: "Goodbye."
translations.zh: 「再見。」

translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「此事吾幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "Don't waste my time! Thou art not wounded!"
translations.zh: 「別浪費我的時間！汝根本沒有受傷！」

translations.en: "'Tis hard enough tending to those truly sick. Begone!"
translations.zh: 「照料真正的病人已夠辛苦了。走開！」

translations.en: "Don't waste my time! None of you are wounded!"
translations.zh: 「別浪費我的時間！你們沒有一個受傷！」

translations.en: "I see thy injury, $Y."
translations.zh: 「吾見到汝的傷，$Y。」

translations.en: "Wilt thou make an offering of 40 gold?"
translations.zh: 「汝願意獻上40枚金幣嗎？」

translations.en: Sasha approaches $Y and binds the wounds.
translations.zh: 莎夏走近$Y，為其包紮傷口。

translations.en: "If thou wilt not pay, I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝不願付酬，吾便無法為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，沒有奉獻，吾無法為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "Thou art poor, but thy cause is just."
translations.zh: 「汝雖貧困，但事出有因。」

translations.en: "I will heal thee without payment."
translations.zh: 「吾將免費為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "Is there aught else I can do for thee?"
translations.zh: 「還有什麼吾能為汝效勞的？」

translations.en: "Don't waste my time! Thou art not poisoned!"
translations.zh: 「別浪費我的時間！汝根本未中毒！」

translations.en: "Don't waste my time! None of you are poisoned!"
translations.zh: 「別浪費我的時間！你們沒有一個中毒！」

translations.en: "I sense that thou art poisoned, $Y."
translations.zh: 「吾感知到汝中了毒，$Y。」

translations.en: "Wilt thou make an offering of 15 gold?"
translations.zh: 「汝願意獻上15枚金幣嗎？」

translations.en: Sasha grabs a vial and pours it down $Y's throat.
translations.zh: 莎夏抓起一個小瓶，將藥液灌入$Y喉中。

translations.en: $Y feels much better.
translations.zh: $Y感覺好多了。

translations.en: "If thou wilt not pay, I cannot cure thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝不願付酬，吾便無法為汝解毒。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot cure thee."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，沒有奉獻，吾無法為汝解毒。」

translations.en: "Thou art poor, but thy cause is just."
translations.zh: 「汝雖貧困，但事出有因。」

translations.en: "I will cure thee without payment."
translations.zh: 「吾將免費為汝解毒。」

translator_notes: Sasha 護士，既用口語（「不」「我」）也用 thou/thee 古語（「汝」「吾」），體現人物既善良又疲憊的雙面性。
